description: CompositionGrey sleeveless kurta made of 100% cotton, that has a red pin-tucked upper bust panel on the front, a squared boat neckline and slit side hems FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outUpgrade your casual look with this chic kurta from W! The pink-tucked red panel gives a dose of colour to the grey kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day long. Team it with leggings or a white loose kameez and chunky accessories. Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
